docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT SEAVIEW INSURANCE COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEAVIEW INSURANCE COMPANY $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,225.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
